overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a hooded character in white robes exploring a sunlit Islamic palace garden with water features, palm trees, and intricate stone architecture. The character walks through open courtyards and covered walkways before ascending to an upper terrace where they engage in stealth combat with an enemy guard.

scene_state.functional_zone: palace garden with water canal and stone gazebo

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the flower bed path beside the water canal toward the ornate stone gazebo

entered.detail: rectangular water feature with stone edges running parallel to the path
tall date palm trees lining the far side of the water canal
long rectangular planter filled with white flowering plants between the path and water
octagonal stone pavilion with arched openings and a domed roof
colorful patterned carpet laid on the stone pathway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit palace garden path beside a water canal lined with palm trees. White flowers bloom in the beds between the path and water, while an ornate stone gazebo stands ahead. The scene is bright and open with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard transition with fabric canopy and tiled walls

events.description: character moves from open garden into partially covered walkway with fabric canopy overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard and entering the shaded area beneath the fabric canopy

entered.detail: tan fabric shade cloth stretched overhead on wooden poles creating dappled shadows
wall decorated with blue and white geometric Islamic tile patterns
low wooden seating with red cushions against the tiled wall
tall terracotta urns placed along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character passes the stone gazebo and enters a semi-covered courtyard area. Fabric canopies provide shade over the tiled path, while walls display intricate blue geometric tilework. Large clay pots and cushioned benches line the walkway as the garden water features recede from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with market stalls and decorative elements

events.description: character turns right to exit the covered canopy area toward the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the shaded courtyard passing wooden furniture and decorative items

notable_agents.action: guard standing against the tiled wall wearing red and black clothing

entered.detail: low wooden table with decorative bowls and plates arranged on top
ornate metal lantern on a stand against the wall
wide stone staircase leading up to the upper terrace level
wall-mounted water feature with intricate tile surround

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the covered walkway where wooden tables display decorative items and a guard stands against the tiled wall. The fabric canopy continues overhead while a stone staircase becomes visible ahead, leading to an upper terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace walkway with flower beds overlooking the garden

events.description: character begins ascending the stone stairs to the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone stairs to reach the upper terrace level

entered.detail: long planter filled with dense blue flowers lining the terrace edge
stone balustrade with geometric cutout patterns
decorative banners and lights strung between palm trees
ornate stone building exterior with carved details and wooden doors

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered area and ascends the stone stairs to an open upper terrace. Blue flower beds line the left side while decorative lattice walls and string lights appear ahead. The view opens up to show the garden below and distant palm groves.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with building facade and combat encounter

events.description: character performs stealth takedown on enemy guard walking toward them

agents.ego_description: approaching an enemy guard and performing a stealth assassination with a blade

notable_agents.action: enemy guard in red robes and helmet walking toward the player before being taken down

entered.detail: arched wooden door with metal studs set in the stone building facade
wooden barrels and crates piled near the doorway
large ornate metal lantern suspended from a chain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the elevated terrace past blue flower beds and approaches a wooden doorway flanked by stacked barrels. An enemy guard in red robes appears ahead walking toward the character, who then performs a stealth takedown as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open palace garden into a shaded architectural corridor before ascending to an elevated terrace. It begins with the character walking along a sunlit path beside a water canal and palm trees, moving toward an ornate stone gazebo under clear skies. As the character passes the gazebo, the scene shifts into a semi-covered courtyard where fabric canopies provide shade over blue geometric tilework and cushioned benches. The camera then follows the character deeper into the covered walkway past decorative tables and a stationary guard before turning toward a stone staircase. Finally, the character emerges from the shade to ascend the stairs onto an open upper terrace lined with blue flowers, moving past stacked barrels to perform a stealth takedown on a guard in red robes.
